description: Sent by the coordinator to an engine to perform the next step of data transformation

datasetId.description: Unique identifier of the output dataset.

datasetAlias.description: Alias of the output dataset, for logging purposes only.

systemTime.description: System time to use for new records.

transform.description: Transformation that will be applied to produce new data.

queryInputs.description: Defines inputs used in this transaction. Slices corresponding to every input dataset must be present.

nextOffset.description: Starting offset to use for new data records.

prevCheckpointPath.description: TODO: This will be removed when coordinator will be speaking to engines purely through Arrow.

newCheckpointPath.description: TODO: This will be removed when coordinator will be speaking to engines purely through Arrow.

newDataPath.description: TODO: This will be removed when coordinator will be speaking to engines purely through Arrow.
